cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.3)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "C:/Users/carde/Desktop/MUACK/BinaryEquaLab/build-v3/_deps/eigen3-src/cmake")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX;RC")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/gcc.exe")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "15.2.0")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/g++.exe")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "15.2.0")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER "C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/windres.exe")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_ID "")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_VERSION "")

project(CheckFortran LANGUAGES Fortran)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER}\")
")
